snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker
https://www.instagram.com/bakerhennie/

Visuals by NFTP  

Producer-Shristi Karki (Shii) 
Director & Editor-Gaurav Bista   
DOP-Newjal Shrestha  Nhuja Shakya  
Production Manager-Shyam Khadka   
Choreographer-Kritika Baral   
Creative Director-Risheek Pradhan  
Assistant Director-Animesh Deep Shankar   
Casting Director-Rajeev Thapa  
Drone & FPV Pilot-Akash Regmi  
Editor-Gaurav Bista   
Coloring-NFTP  
PD/Art Director-Ghanashyam Shrestha  
Asst.Art-Gyanendra Tamang, Mohan Tamang, Shreeniwash Chaudhary,  Nitesh Gupta   
Asst. production-Anup Khadka, Mahesh GM  
Head Gaffer-Ganesh singh Thakuri  
Lights-Photon films and lights   
Camera rental-KathaChitra  
AC-Ganesh & Niraj Chettri  
Light Man-Madhu Khati(Dhrum), Chaudhary Dai And Team
Crane-LightBenders  
Crane Operators-Prashant Yogi, Bijaya Ramtel(Kale)
Crane Taker-Prakash Shudras
Crane Intern-Shantosh Pariyar   
BTS-XYZ   
Costume Designer-Sujan Ratna Pariyar   
Stylist-Sushmita Rijal (suzustyles)  
Costumes By-Veshbhusa Design studio
Sponsors-OV Education, Riva Natural Spring water  

Cast-PREMA LAMGADE, LIL JHOLA, YOGESHBEATS, LIL LHAKEY, Sujal Bhagat, Rajeev Thapa, XuZeyu Lama, Pramod Panta, Anjan Dhakal, 

Dancers-Lakpa Lama, Prithivu Bhujel, Jivan Lama, Suraj Biru, Aman, Alvish Lama, Dinesh, Jivan tamang  

Special Thanks-Shayuj Pokhrel, Abiskar Gautam, Nj Shakya  

Beat produced by Yogeshbeats
https://www.instagram.com/yogeshbeats/

Mix/Master by 4z
https://www.instagram.com/4zboi/

#jamesy #selfmade #nachana

snippet.title: Ko Xa Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. It’s a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams — thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.title: CID Bahu | सी.आई.डी बहू | Official Trailer | Amrapali Dubey | New Bhojpuri Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Movie: CID Bahu
Star Cast: Amrapali Dubey, Shweta Verma, Rambha Sahani,  Ayaz Khan, Vidhya Singh, Raj Singh Rajpoot, Puja Thakur, Sahil Siddique And Other
Banner: Shreyash Films PVT
Music On: Enter 10 Rangeela
Producer: Prem Rai
Writer & Director: Ananjay Raghuraj 
Dialogue & Screenplay: Arbind Tiwari 
Co-Producer: Shaista Khan  
Music: Sajan Mishra & Om Jha  
Lyrics: Dharam Hindustani, Durgesh Bhatt
Cinematography: Venket Mahesh 
Editor: Gurjant Singh
Choreographer: M K Gupta (Joy) 
Art: Nazir Shaikh
Costume: Vidha-Vishnu 
Post Production: Audio Lab
Background Music: Aslam Surti
Executive Producer: Nihal Singh
D.I & VFX: Mohit Kumar 
Production Controller: Amarjeet Das
Assistant Director: Vivek Kumar 
Stills: Kuber
Design: Narsu

मूवी: सी.आई.डी बहू
स्टार कास्ट: आम्रपाली दुबे, श्वेता वर्मा, रंभा साहनी, अयाज़ खान, विद्या सिंह, राज सिंह राजपूत, पूजा ठाकुर, साहिल सिद्दीकी और अन्य
बैनर: श्रेयश फिल्म्स PVT
म्यूज़िक ऑन: एंटर 10 रंगीला
निर्माता: प्रेम राय
कथा और निर्देशक: अनंजय रघुराज
पटकथा व संवाद : अरबिंद तिवारी
सह निर्माता: शाइस्ता खान
संगीत: साजन मिश्रा और ओम झा
गीत: धरम हिंदुस्तानी, दुर्गेश भट्ट
छायांकन: वेंकेट महेश
संकलन: गुरजंत सिंह
नृत्य: एम के गुप्ता (जॉय)
कला: नज़ीर शेख
कॉस्ट्यूम: विधा-विष्णु
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन: ऑडियो लैब
पार्श्व संगीत: असलम सुरती
कार्यकारी निर्माता: निहाल सिंह
डी.आई. व  वी एफ एक्स : मोहित कुमार
निर्माण नियंत्रक: अमरजीत दास
सहायक निर्देशक: विवेक कुमार
स्टिल्स: कुबेर
डिज़ाईन: नर्सू

📱 Watch Full Movie on Dangal Play

PlayStore URL: https://bit.ly/3Lv4CvE

OSR Digital is one of the largest digital and physical (CD, VCD, DVD) movie distribution companies in Nepal. Now, It stands out as a prominent distributor of super-hit Nepali movie entertainment content on its YouTube channel in the country. The channel primarily focuses on entertaining its viewers with new Nepali movies, encompassing various genres such as action, comedy, romance, horror, drama, etc.

All the videos on this channel are uploaded with full digital copyrights either owned by OSR Digital or officially provided by different content owners. If there are any copyright issues with the uploaded videos, please feel free to contact us to resolve the matter and avoid conflicts.

snippet.title: ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
snippet.description:
Straw Hats! Grab your crew! ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE sets sail on March 10th!

MORE INFO ON ONE PIECE: INTO THE GRAND LINE:
Netflix’s epic high-seas pirate adventure, ONE PIECE, returns for Season 2—unleashing fiercer adversaries and the most perilous quests yet. Luffy and the Straw Hats set sail for the extraordinary Grand Line—a legendary stretch of sea where danger and wonder await at every turn. As they journey through this unpredictable realm in search of the world’s greatest treasure, they’ll encounter bizarre islands and a host of formidable new enemies.

ABOUT ONE PIECE:
Netflix’s live-action adaptation of ONE PIECE is based on Japan’s highest-selling manga series of all time by Eiichiro Oda, with over 100 volumes and 500M copies sold worldwide. The epic high-seas adventure follows Monkey D. Luffy on his quest to find the legendary fabled treasure, the ONE PIECE, and become King of the Pirates. The beloved franchise has a vast, multigenerational global fan base. Upon its debut in 2023, the Netflix live-action series became a global phenomenon, spending eight weeks on the Global Top 10, reaching #1 in over 75 countries and making history as the first Netflix English-language series to debut at #1 in Japan. The show has nearly 100M views and is one of Netflix’s most downloaded shows of all time. ONE PIECE was nominated for 11 awards at the Children’s & Family Emmy Awards, including Outstanding Young Teen Series. The beloved adaptation offers fans ways to engage year-round, off-screen with a brand new immersive experience set to open at Netflix House and fans can bring the world of the live-action show into their everyday lives with products like LEGO, Moose Toys and more at Netflix Shop and retailers worldwide. ONE PIECE returns for its highly anticipated second season in 2026, and has been renewed for Season 3. The show is created in partnership with Shueisha and is produced by Tomorrow Studios (an ITV Studios partner) and Netflix.

Watch on Netflix: https://www.netflix.com/title/81218765

About Netflix:
Netflix is one of the world’s leading entertainment services offering TV series, films, games and live programming across a wide variety of genres and languages. Members can play, pause and resume watching as much as they want, anytime, anywhere, and can change their plans at any time. 

ONE PIECE: Season 2 | Official Trailer | Netflix
https://www.youtube.com/@Netflix

With no power comes no responsibility. "Spider-Noir" - a live-action series starring Nicolas Cage - arrives in True-Hue full color and authentic Black & White May 27 on Prime Video India, available in English, Hindi, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam and Kannada.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#SpiderNoirOnPrime

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Firfirey | OFFICIAL MUSIC VIDEO
snippet.description:
Finally releasing 'Firfirey' after 6 years feels a lot, but here we are. I hope this brings back good memories to you as it does to me. This song resonates of pure love and the emotions it holds is immense for me. I can't believe we've come this far.

Thank you for always being a part of the journey !

Written, composed and performed by Yabesh Thapa 

Flute - Shrijan Maharjan
Drums and Additional Percussions - Bikesh Bazra
Mix/Master - Kobid Bazra (Bajra Creation Records)

Visuals by Noisy

Get connected with us
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/?hl=en

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Minions & Monsters - Official Big Game Spot (2026)
snippet.description:
Watch the Big Game Spot for Minions & Monsters, a new installment in the animated film franchise distributed by Illumination. The film embarks on a new adventure within the Minions universe with all-new characters in Minions & Monsters, in theaters on July 1.

This is the rambunctious, ridiculous and totally true story of how the Minions conquered Hollywood, became movie stars, lost everything, unleashed monsters onto the world and then banded together to try and save the planet from the mayhem they had just created. 

Minions & Monsters is directed by Academy Award® nominee Pierre Coffin, a director of the first three Despicable Me films and the first Minions film. Coffin has also provided the voice for the Minions since their film debut in 2010. The film is written by Brian Lynch (Minions, The Secret Life of Pets films) and Pierre Coffin and is produced by Illumination’s Academy Award® nominated founder and CEO Chris Meledandri and by Bill Ryan (executive producer, The Super Mario Bros. Movie). The executive producer is Brian Lynch.

Minions & Monsters is in theaters on July 1.

#IGN

snippet.title: Rikesh Gurung Keys - Ma Timrai Hu | Official Song
snippet.description:
Rikesh Gurung Keys - Ma Timrai Hu | Official Song

#matimraihu #newnepalisong #lovesongnepali 


Lyrics 

[ Sansar Feriyo Timro Ujyalole 
Man Mandirbho Timro Aagamanle ] - 2 
Badliyeka chhan Mero Ranga Haru 
Kaha Nai Janchhu Ma Timrai Ta Hu 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahirahu la 
Jati Badha , Aayeni Timrai Aghi Hula 

Bihanile Ghaam , Saajhale Juno 
Parkhirahe Jhai Parkhirahu 
Khola Jhai Timi , Kinara Bhaye Ma 
Bagirahnu , Malai Chhoyi Rahanu 

[Maya Yo Sadhai Bhari 
Bagi Bagi Bagi Rahos 
Timimai Timimai 
Sansar Chali Rahos ] - 2 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahula 
Jati Badha Aayeni , Timrai Aghi Hula

snippet.description:
Pre - order Pratibimba Vol II:
Link : https://classxpresentation.com/np/shop/product/pratibimba-vol-2

Welcome To The Party, is a single from DonG along with aspiring singer/composer, NIXDII . 

Written, composed and performed by Dong and Nixdii
Music Prod. by pozod

Production Company: SOTA inc. , Class X Presentation
Executive Producers : Mahesh Tamang , Jyoti Shrestha

snippet.title: Meri Ujeli (Official Music Video) -  Pahenlo Batti Muni
snippet.description:
Meri Ujeli is an ode to the brightness and warmth we’ve received from all those we have loved and those who have loved us. 

Stream the HQ Audio here: https://silentroar.ffm.to/meriujeli-pbm

Lyrics:
आकाशले त्यागेको पानीको नि
साथी बनिदिने इन्द्रेणी

जङ्गल खरानी भएपछि
टुसाउँछ जुन फूल बसन्त बनी

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

शहरको चर्‍को कोलाहललाई
चिरेर गाउने सुस्केरी
गल्ली-गल्लीभित्रका चोकसरी
एक पहेली हौ, नयाँ दुनियाँ पनि

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

बसन्तको गोँधूलीको अँगालोसरी
न्यानो छौ तिमी
मेरी उजेली

जूनकी सङ्गिनी, बगैँचाझैँ रङ्गीली,
कथाझैँ छौ तिमी, मेरी उजेली

मेरी उजेली तिमी, मेरी उजेली
मेरी उजेली तिमी, तिमी मेरी उजेली

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

“Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0” — a soulful recreation of a 90s Bollywood classic, bringing back the essence of old is gold with a fresh and modern touch.
This song blends nostalgic romance with new-age sound, creating a melody that touches the heart and revives golden memories.

🎧 Vibe: Old is Gold – 90s Bollywood Romantic
🎤 Vocals: Male & Female Duet

Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh
snippet.description:
Dil Lagana Mana Tha (Official MV) Krish & Kishore Mondal | Kunaal V, Devv S | Sanam Johar Ashi Singh

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

👉 𝑺𝒖𝒃𝒔𝒄𝒓𝒊𝒃𝒆 𝒕𝒐 @𝑹𝑫𝑪𝑴𝒆𝒍𝒐𝒅𝒊𝒆𝒔 𝒇𝒐𝒓 𝒎𝒐𝒓𝒆 𝒓𝒐𝒎𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒊𝒄 𝒉𝒊𝒕𝒔 𝒂𝒏𝒅 𝒏𝒆𝒘 𝒓𝒆𝒍𝒆𝒂𝒔𝒆𝒔!

🎶 𝑺𝑶𝑵𝑮 𝑪𝑹𝑬𝑫𝑰𝑻𝑺 :-
Singer:  Krish & Kishore Mondal 
Starring: Sanam Johar & Ashi Singh
Lyrics: Kunaal Vermaa
Producer: Durgaram Choudhary
Music Composer: Devv Sadaana
Music Arrangement & Programming: Sharan Rawat
Mixing & Mastering: Bhasker Sarma @ Euphony Studio
©️ Koo Koo Tv 
Digital Partner: RDC Media

𝑳𝑰𝑲𝑬, 💬 𝑪𝑶𝑴𝑴𝑬𝑵𝑻 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒇𝒂𝒗𝒐𝒓𝒊𝒕𝒆 𝒍𝒊𝒏𝒆, 𝒂𝒏𝒅 🔁 𝑺𝑯𝑨𝑹𝑬 𝒊𝒕 𝒘𝒊𝒕𝒉 𝒚𝒐𝒖𝒓 𝒇𝒓𝒊𝒆𝒏𝒅𝒔.

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye

Na dil se vo yaadein jaayein
Na raaton ko neendein aayein
Aate hain phir khwab kyu
Aate hain kyu khaab
Jo thi tere ishq mein doobi
Un ankhon mein tum le aaye
Aasu behisaab kyu
Aasu behisaab
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Khair hai yaaron kam se kam
Jaan se jaa na paaye hum
Inkaar ke bahaane kayi baar karte karte

Humne wahin lagaya dil
Jahaan dil lagana mana tha
Akhir wahin kiye sajde jahan
Sar jhukana mana tha
Kyu zindagi bita di jahaan pe
ik pal bitaana mana tha
Kyu us gali mein rehte they hum
Jahaan roz jaana mana tha

Zamaane ki taraah
Hum bhi tode hain gaye
Aise tanha to na the Tanha chode hain gaye
Jo duaayein dete they
Haan usi ke hothon se
Aise waise lafz bhi
Humse bole hain gaye

baitho kisi roz tanhai mein
Rakho samne wakt ke aaine
Jo aagea chehra nazar vo kahin
Tumhe bewafa kehke has na pade

Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe
Tujhe dil diya istemaal huye
Hai tujhmein bhi dil ye khayaal rahe

Hum aazmaye gaye magar unhe aazmana mana tha
Humne wahin lagaya dil jahan dil lagana mana tha

en.description:

𝑨𝒃𝒐𝒖𝒕 𝒕𝒉𝒆 𝑽𝒊𝒅𝒆𝒐 :-

Dil Lagana Mana Tha is an emotional romantic song that captures the pain of falling in love when the heart was warned not to. This video portrays deep feelings of love, heartbreak, and unspoken emotions, reflecting the journey of a heart that couldn’t resist love despite knowing the consequences. Beautiful visuals and soulful music come together to tell a story many will relate to.

snippet.title: Tamang Selo - Figure Timro Dami · फिगर तिम्रो दामी - Official MV
snippet.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@kumarbmzn  https://www.facebook.com/Kumarbmzntamang 

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.
Thank you for the continued love and support ❤️

Presented by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗺𝘇𝗻  | Music Distribution Partner 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸.

♫ 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
✎ Lyricist: Kumarbmzn 
♪ Music Composer: Bishwo Dong 
🎙 Singer: Bishwo Dong and Shanti Shree Pariyar
🎸 Music Arranger: Bishwo Dong
🎛️ Mixing Master: Dipesh Pradhan
🎧 Rec.: Dong Studio 

🎬 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼 𝗖𝗿𝗲𝗱𝗶𝘁:
🎭 Artist: Rasmila Tamang | Ashish Manandhar

🖼️ Post Production: Luminous Postwork

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
 
Please don’t forget to 𝗟𝗶𝗸𝗲, 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗿𝗲, 𝗦𝘂𝗯𝘀𝗰𝗿𝗶𝗯𝗲 and leave your valuable feedback in the comments below.
Thank you for the continued love and support ❤️

Presented by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿𝗯𝗺𝘇𝗻  | Music Distribution Partner 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗦𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗸.

snippet.title: Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱
snippet.description:
#NessFitGamer #gta 5 #gta5hindi #gta5mods 

Franklin Traps ALL DEADLY GHOST Inside Evil Watch in Indian Bike Driving 3D! 😱

In this story, Shinchan and Franklin get trapped inside another world created by the Evil Watch. The demon inside the watch traps them and takes Shinchan away with him. To save Shinchan, Franklin must trap all the ghosts and monsters that were released from the Evil Watch back inside it. These include Granny, Huggy Wuggy, Mr. Meat, Choo-Choo Charles, Kamla , and the Pennywise. Will Franklin be able to save Shinchan or not? Watch the full scary story to find out!

Instagram
https://www.instagram.com/nessfitgamer01?igsh=MTBudmpzZGdnZXljNg==

I hope you guys enjoyed this video if you did please consider to like the video and subscribe the channel. ❤️

Some 3D assets and mods are sourced from community modders and are used for fan-made cinematic purposes.
No ownership is claimed over any third-party assets.

Disclaimer:
This video is made using GTA 5, with Indian Bike Driving 3D assets added inside the game.

This is NOT actual gameplay of Indian Bike Driving 3D. Everything shown is custom-made using GTA mods. All characters and events shown in this video are fictional and created for entertainment purpose.

snippet.description:
Turn up the volume and relive the early 2000s magic with “Dhak Chik Dana” from Yeh Dil Aashiqana, now presented in stunning 8K Ultra HD quality 🔥✨

Featuring Karan Nath & Jividha, this energetic track is beautifully sung by Kumar Sanu & Anuradha Paudwal, with unforgettable music by the legendary Nadeem-Shravan.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Lyrics: Shape of You - Ed Sheeran

The club isn't the best place to find a lover
So the bar is where I go (mmmm)
Me and my friends at the table doing shots
Drinking fast and then we talk slow (mmmm)
And you come over and start up a conversation with just me
And trust me I'll give it a chance now (mmmm)
Take my hand, stop, put Van The Man on the jukebox
And then we start to dance
And now I'm singing like
Girl, you know I want your love
Your love was handmade for somebody like me
Come on now, follow my lead
I may be crazy, don't mind me
Say, boy, let's not talk too much
Grab on my waist and put that body on me
Come on now, follow my lead
Come, come on now, follow my lead (mmmm)
I'm in love with the shape of you
We push and pull like a magnet do
Although my heart is falling too
I'm in love with your body
Last night you were in my room
And now my bedsheets smell like you
Every day discovering something brand new
I'm in love with your body
Oh I oh I oh I oh I
I'm in love with your body
Oh I oh I oh I oh I
I'm in love with your body
Oh I oh I oh I oh I
I'm in love with your body

We're going out on our first date (mmmm)
You and me are thrifty, so go all you can eat
Fill up your bag and I fill up a plate (mmmm)
We talk for hours and hours about the sweet and the sour
And how your family is doing okay (mmmm)
And leave and get in a taxi, then kiss in the backseat
Tell the driver make the radio play

snippet.description:
After Lettuce paused the Unstable SMP election and declared himself the interim leader, he captured me and my best friend Theo. Now I have to start from scratch, escape, save Theo, and defeat Lettuce. This is How I Became King of the Unstable SMP. 

Unstable SMP:
➜ ‪  ‪@wemmbumc 
➜ ‪  ‪@FlameFragsMC 
➜ ‪  @Spokeishere 
➜ ‪  ‪@ParrotX2 

Like ParrotX2 and his Unstable SMP series, where he is escaping Paragon / Proton: Minecraft's Most Secure Prison, or got hunted by a Minecraft Player who doesn't exist. This is a new and original Minecraft idea like HermitCraft or Lifesteal with Wemmbu, FlameFrags, or Spoke. Survival is harder than Hardcore Minecraft because PVP is on.

People in this video: @TheobaldTheBird @LettuceK @Boosfer @PurpledMC @wemmbumc @FlameFragsMC @Spokeishere @jumperwho @minutetechmc @JadenMAN @PrinceZam @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @Leowook 

Original Music by @tsynphonia 

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where ParrotX2, Wemmbu, Spoke, and FlameFrags tell stories in Minecraft.

A Minecraft video made by Parrot or ParrotX2 on other platforms! Enjoy!

snippet.title: Ruth B. - Dandelions (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Ruth B. - Dandelions
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
Maybe it's the way you say my name
Maybe it's the way you play your game
But it's so good, I've never known anybody like you
But it's so good, I've never dreamed of nobody like you

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
'Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Verse 2]
I think that you are the one for me
Cause it gets so hard to breathe
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so alive and free
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so happy

[Pre-Chorus]
And I've heard of a love that comes once in a lifetime
And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

[Chorus]
Cause I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Bridge]
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Outro]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine

snippet.title: Gehra Hua - 8K Video | Dhurandhar | Ranveer Singh, Sara A, Shashwat Sachdev, Arijit Singh, Irshad K
snippet.description:
Pure emotion Pure romance Gehra Hua by Arijit Singh in stunning 8K.

👉 Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR

Written, Directed and Produced by: Aditya Dhar
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by: Lokesh Dhar

Cast: Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, Akshaye Khanna, R. Madhavan, Arjun Rampal, Sara Arjun

A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Composed, Produced and arranged by Shashwat Sachdev 
Singer: Arijit Singh, Armaan Khan 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma
Music producers: Sayantan Guha, Yash Singh
Bassist: Mohini Dey 
Tabla: Fateh Mohammed Sulemani

https://facebook.com/zayn

https://instagram.com/inzayn 
https://twitter.com/inzayn 
www.inzayn.com 

Video director: Ivanna Borin x Frank Borin
Video producer: Shayna Gianelli
Video editor: Ivanna Borin
Production Company : UnderWonder Content

Lyrics
Good times and bad times
I gave you my everything
I tried and I tried
To love you through anything
Swore to each other
We’d never be enemies
Why the fuck would you say that to me

Ain’t nothing worse than somebody who
Lies to your face and then swears it’s the truth
If you have a heart rip it up let it bleed

Cuz you said you would die for me
Say you would die for me
Say you would die for me

Don’t leave me now
When I need you the most
Gave you my heart
Don’t you dare let it go
say you would die for me
say you would die for me

Don’t leave me now
When I need you the most
Said you would die for me
said you never never let me go

2 am
You ain’t home
Call your friends
Said your gone
I’m not gonna wait up here
Go ahead and stay out ther
Oo
I’ll sleep just fine without you
Yeah yeah yea

Ain’t nothing worse than somebody who
Lies to your face and then swears it’s the truth
I love you, I love you, you said it out
Those empty words you were spitting out
You told me you love me
where are you now
Say you would die for me
Say you would die for me
Don’t leave me now
When I need you the most
Gave you my heart
Don’t you dare let it go

Say you would die for me
Say you would die for me
Don’t leave me now

When I need you the most
Said you would die for me
Said you’d never never let me go
Die for me
Say you would die for me
Say you would die for me
Don’t leave me now
When I need you the most
Said you would die for me
Said you never never let me go

#Zayn #DieForMe #KONNAKOL

snippet.title: 4 Minecraft Pros VS 2500 Players
snippet.description:
On the Unstable SMP, I assembled the best team of players to fight back against the LAW and my greatest enemy, Leo! This is how I Fought a War with Parrot, FlameFrags, and Wemmbu…

4 Minecraft Pros VS 2500 Players


Unstable SMP Members
➜ @wemmbumc 
➜ @FlameFragsMC 
➜ @ParrotX2 
➜ @Spokeishere 





possible spoilers below this point

Features: @ParrotX2 @wemmbumc @FlameFragsMC @Leowook @jumperwho @MapiccMc @PrinceZam @minutetechmc @LettuceK eggchan @TheobaldTheBird @JadenMAN @PurpledMC @fymada @HoraceMinecraft @Lomedy 

music: 
Ivory /  @ivoryfrill  &  @MythrodakTV  
DM DOKURO /  @DMDOKURO  
Chris Christodoulou /  @AstronautDown 
Pascal Stiefel /  @Plasma3Music  
Lena Raine / @LenaRaine 
C418 / @C418
Peter McConnell

This is a video on the Unstable Universe: a staged Minecraft server where Spoke, Wemmbu, FlameFrags, and ParrotX2 aim to tell the best stories possible. btw a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

written, recorded, & edited by spoke

snippet.title: Phsyco – Andhakar Jivan | Feat. Jung Ji & Vol Quake | (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Andhakar Jivan by Phsyco featuring Jung Ji & Vol Quake is a nepali rap song that reflects inner battles, broken dreams, and the silent pain hidden in everyday life. This emotional Nepali hip hop track explores psychological struggles, social hypocrisy, and the search for truth in a world where faith, humanity, and hope are constantly questioned. A raw and intense anthem representing real Nepali rap culture and underground hip hop. 🕯️🔥

🎵 Song Credits
Produced by Vol Quake
Mixed & Mastered by Vol Quake
Performed by Phsyco, Jung Ji & Vol Quake

🎬 Video Credits
Shot by Zen
Color  & Edit by Vol Quake

🤝 Support
Supported by Hood Wears

🔔 Stay connected for the full release [13 February ,2026]

💛 Special Thanks To: TG Gang and Phsyco Brothers

🔗 FOLLOW Phsyco

snippet.title: Shawn Mendes - Treat You Better (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎵 Follow the official 7clouds playlist on Spotify : http://spoti.fi/2SJsUcZ
​🎧 Shawn Mendes - Treat You Better (Lyrics)
⏬ Download / Stream: https://open.spotify.com/track/3QGsuHI8jO1Rx4JWLUh9jd
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

❤️ Follow our Spotify playlists: http://bit.ly/7cloudsSpotify

https://open.spotify.com/artist/7n2wHs1TKAczGzO7Dd2rGr

https://soundcloud.com/7cloudsmusic

https://instagram.com/7clouds
https://tiktok.com/@7clouds
https://7clouds.org

.........
🎤 Lyrics: 
I won't lie to you
I know he's just not right for you
And you can tell me if I'm off, but I see it on your face
When you say that he's the one that you want
And you're spendin' all your time in this wrong situation
And anytime you want it to stop
I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me, why are we wasting time on all your wasted cryin'
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better, better than he can
I'll stop time for you
The second you say you'd like me to
I just wanna give you the loving that you're missing
Baby, just to wake up with you
Would be everything I need, and this could be so different
Tell me what you want to do
'Cause I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me, why are we wasting time on all your wasted cryin'
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better, better than he can
Better than he can
Give me a sign, take my hand, we'll be fine
Promise I won't let you down
Just know that you don't have to do this alone
Promise I'll never let you down
'Cause I know I can treat you better than he can
And any girl like you deserves a gentleman
Tell me, why are we wasting time on all your wasted cryin'
When you should be with me instead?
I know I can treat you better, better than he can, oh
Better than he can
Better than he can
.........

SujalisLive is a Hindi gaming channel where I upload entertaining and story-driven videos on Roblox. Right now, I'm focused on **Roblox Blox Fruits** — one of the most popular One Piece-inspired games on Roblox, where you fight bosses, level up, and become the strongest player.  

Whether you're a beginner or a pro, you'll find funny moments, grinding tips, and epic battles here — all in Hinglish. Join the journey as I build a loyal gaming audience for GTA 6 and beyond!

SujalisLive is a Hindi gaming channel where I upload entertaining and story-driven videos on Roblox. Right now, I'm focused on **Roblox Blox Fruits** — one of the most popular One Piece-inspired games on Roblox, where you fight bosses, level up, and become the strongest player.  

Whether you're a beginner or a pro, you'll find funny moments, grinding tips, and epic battles here — all in Hinglish. Join the journey as I build a loyal gaming audience for GTA 6 and beyond!

snippet.title: Justin Bieber - What Do You Mean (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
👑 Justin Bieber - What Do You Mean (Lyrics)
🎶 Listen on Spotify: http://bit.ly/4c1YIwO
🔥 Help us reach 100,000 subscribers!
🔔 Turn on notifications to stay updated with new uploads!

🎧 Stream & Download: http://smarturl.it/iWDYM?IQid=YT

✨ Follow Justin Bieber:
https://www.instagram.com/justinbieber

📱 Follow us on:
Instagram: https://auranetwork.fanlink.tv/instagram
Facebook: https://auranetwork.fanlink.tv/facebook
Discord: https://auranetwork.fanlink.tv/discord
X(twitter): https://auranetwork.fanlink.tv/xsocial

×=×=×=×=×  

Lyrics for "Justin Bieber - What Do You Mean"

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? Oh, what do you mean?
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean?
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean?
Better make up your mind, what do you mean?

[Verse 1]
You’re so indecisive of what I'm sayin'
Tryna catch the beat, make up your heart
Don't know if you're happy or complainin'
Don't want for us to end, where do I start?

[Pre-Chorus]
First you wanna go to the left, then you wanna turn right (Right)
Wanna argue all day, makin' love all night (All night)
First you're up, then you’re down, and then between ('Tween)
Oh, I really wanna know

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? Oh, what do you mean?
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean?
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean?

[Verse 2]
You’re overprotective when I'm leavin'
Tryna compromise, but I can’t win
You wanna make a point, but you keep preachin'
You had me from the start, won't let this end

[Pre-Chorus]
First you wanna go to the left, then you wanna turn right
(Turn right)
Wanna argue all day, makin' love all night (All night)
First you're up, then you’re down, and then between ('Tween)
Oh, I really wanna know

[Chorus]
What do you mean? Oh, oh (Yeah, yeah, yeah, yeah)
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? (Oh, what do you mean?) Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move, but you tell me to go
What do you mean? (I wanna know, ooh)
Oh, what do you mean? (Ooh)
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean? (Oh, baby)
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean? (Don't be so selfish, baby, yeah, yeah) Oh, oh
When you nod your head yes, but you wanna say no
What do you mean? (You're so confusin', baby) Hey, yeah
When you don't want me to move (Hey), but you tell me to go
What do you mean? (Be more straightforward)
Oh, what do you mean? (Hey, ah, ah, ah)
Said you're runnin' outta time, what do you mean? (Hey, ah, ah, ah)
Oh, oh, oh, what do you mean? Better make up your mind
What do you mean?

×=×=×=×=×

snippet.title: Hami - Grunchiez (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
Some songs are written.Some songs are lived.
“Hami” is not just music — it’s a reminder. A reminder that no matter how divided the world feels, we rise stronger together.

This song speaks about unity, love, peace, and the invisible bond that connects us all. In a time where noise is louder than truth, Hami stands for togetherness. For standing side by side. For choosing compassion over conflict.

We poured our sweat, silence, sound, and solidarity into this project. Every frame, every lyric, every chord carries a piece of us.

If this song resonates with you, share it with your people. Because “Hami” isn’t about me. It’s about us.

🎧 Stream “Hami” on all major platforms.
🔔 Don’t forget to like, comment & subscribe to support independent music.
📍 Follow Grunchiez for more music, stories, and energy.
We are one. We are many. We are Hami.

Special Thanks:
String Buzz - Jwalan Shrestha
Soundfusion Studio
Friends and Family

[Audio Credits]
Written | Composition | Production : Grunchiez 
Audio Recorded : Sound Fusion Studio
Sound Engineered / Mixed / Mastered : Rohitaj Gurung
Recordist : Bipin Maharjan

[Video Credits]
DOP/ Cinematography/ Edits: Samir Vision
https://www.instagram.com/samirvisi0n/


Grunchiez is:
Sambhav Ban (Vocal)
https://www.instagram.com/sambhav_ban

Kshitiz Singh Pariyar (Guitars/BackVocal)
https://www.instagram.com/___kshitiz._

Rohan Dorje Tamang(Drums)
https://www.instagram.com/pyaj_lasun.og

Pranish Pariyar (Guitars)
https://www.instagram.com/pranish.grunchiez

Saugat Karkidhali (Bass)
https://www.instagram.com/saugat_karkidhali31hz

Lyrics:
उधाको किरण फेरि डुब्दैछ
अस्ताको यो रहर फेरि उठ्दैछ
दुखी थयो यो मन फेरि रमाउँदैछ
समाउन यो हात अब छुट्दैन (x2)

तिमी र म
हामी एउटै कुरा
संसार छ
हामीलाई रोक्न यहाँ (x2)

तिमी र म, हामी एउटै कुरा
संसार छ हामीलाई रोक्न यहाँ
Wo Oh Ohhooh!

बग्दै जाऊँन हामी दुवै
मायाका खोलामा पौडिँदै अझै
हाम्रो सास बनी हामी दुवै
भुलिदिऊँ दुःख हाम्रो सबै

तिमी र म
तिमी र म सधैँ
तिमी र म
तिमी र म अझै (x2)

तिमी र म
हामी एउटै कुरा
संसार छ
हामीलाई रोक्न यहाँ (x2)

तिमी र म
तिमी र म सधैँ
तिमी र म
तिमी र म अझै (x3)

Stay connected with us :
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/grunchiez
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/grunchiez_ 

About Grunchiez:
Grunchiez is a Grunge/Alternative Rock band from Nepal, dedicated to creating music that resonates with the soul. Our songs often reflect the social issues and personal struggles that many face, aiming to inspire change and uplift spirits through powerful lyrics and melodies.

Thank you for watching and supporting us on this journey!

All Rights Reserved, Grunchiez 2026.

snippet.title: Ed Sheeran - Perfect (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
☀️Radio Paradise☀️

Subscribe and stay connected to what’s playing today.

📱Ed Sheeran - Perfect:
https://open.spotify.com/intl-es/track/0tgVpDi06FyKpA1z0VMD4v
https://youtu.be/cNGjD0VG4R8?si=T4A45O-LthAe-X2_

LYRIC
I found a love for me
Darling, just dive right in and follow my lead
I found a girl, beautiful and sweet
I never knew you were the someone waiting for me

'Cause we were just kids when we fell in love
Not knowing what it was
I will not give you up this time
Darling, just kiss me slow
Your heart is all I own
And in your eyes, you're holding mine

Baby I'm, dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When you said you looked a mess
I whispered underneath my breath
But you heard it
Darling, you look perfect tonight

I found a woman, stronger than anyone I know
She shares my dreams, I hope that someday I'll share her home
I found a lover to carry more than just my secrets
To carry love, to carry children of our own

We are still kids, but we're so in love
Fighting against all odds
I know we'll be alright this time
Darling, just hold my hand
Be my girl, I'll be your man
I see my future in your eyes

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
When I saw you in that dress
Looking so beautiful
I don't deserve this
Darling, you look perfect tonight

Baby, I'm dancing in the dark
With you between my arms
Barefoot on the grass
Listening to our favourite song
I have faith in what I see
Now I know I have met an angel in person
And she looks perfect
I don't deserve this
You look perfect tonight

#EdSheeran #Perfect #Lyrics

snippet.title: Reacting To "The Rise Of Foltyn"
snippet.description:
Today I reacted to the RISE OF FOLTYN. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

snippet.title: Tere Sang Yaara | Rustom | Akshay Kumar & Ileana D'Cruz | Romantic Hindi Song | Valentine's Day 2026
snippet.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Zee Music Company - https://bit.ly/ZeeMusicCo 

Song: Tere Sang Yaara
Movie: Rustom
Lyrics: Manoj Muntashir
Music: Arko
Guitarist: Krishna Pradhan
Produced & Mixed by: Aditya Dev
Mastered by: Shadab Rayeen

#teresangyaara #rustom #akshaykumar #arko #ileanadcruz

Cast: Akshay Kumar, Ileana D'cruz, Arjan Bajwa, Esha Gupta
Banner: Zee Studios, Kriarj Entertaiment, Cape of Good Films & Friday Filmworks
Directed by: Tinu Suresh Desai
Produced by: Neeraj Pandey, Aruna Bhatia, Nittin Keni, Akash Chawla, Virender Arora, Ishwar Kapoor & Shital Bhatia

Lyrics:
Tere Sang Yaara
Khush Rang Bahara
Tu Raat Deewani
Main Zard Sitaara

O Karam Khudaya Hai
Tujhe Mujhse Milaya Hai
Tujhpe Marke Hi Toh
Mujhe Jeena Aaya Hai

O Tere Sang Yaara...
Khush Rang Bahara
Tu Raat Deewani
Main Zard Sitaara

O Tere Sang Yaara
Khush Rang Bahara
Main Tera Ho Jaaun
Jo Tu Karde Ishara

Kahin Kisi Bhi Gali Mein Jaaun Main
Teri Khushboo Se Takraaun Main
Har Raat Jo Aata Hai Mujhe
Woh Khwaab Tu...

Tera Mera Milna Dastoor Hai
Tere Hone Se Mujhme Noor Hai
Main Hoon Soona Sa Ek Aasmaan
Mehtaab Tu...

O Karam Khudaya Hai
Tujhe Maine Jo Paaya Hai
Tujhpe Marke Hi Toh
Mujhe Jeena Aaya Hai

O Tere Sang Yaara
Khushrang Bahara
Tu Raat Deewani
Main Zard Sitaara

O Tere Sang Yaara
Khushrang Bahara
Tere Bin Ab Toh
Na Jeena Gawara

Maine Chhode Hain Baaki Saare Raste
Bas Aaya Hoon Tere Paas Re
Meri Aankhon Mein Tera Naam Hai
Pehchaan Le...

Sab Kuch Mere Liye Tere Baad Hai
Sau Baaton Ki Ik Baat Hai
Main Na Jaunga Kabhi Tujhe Chhod Ke
Yeh Jaan Le

O Karam Khudaya Hai
Tera Pyar Jo Paaya Hai
Tujhpe Marke Hi Toh
Mujhe Jeena Aaya Hai

O Tere Sang Yaara
Khush Rang Bahara
Tu Raat Deewani
Main Zard Sitaara

O Tere Sang Yaara
Khush Rang Bahara
Main Behta Musafir
Tu Thehra Kinara

your night Deewani

Lyrics: 
Lu hai Manungkotaima mero dil basyo lali othaimaa.
Lu hai manung kotaima najar nalagau lali othaima.

Pirati lam na ta Saili ghumna lai jamna ta.
Pirati launna ma Saila ekdine pauna sa.

Oi hoi damauli katesi madiko pool hitaiko mayalai gulab ko phool.

Ghara mero rukumai timi Mam pareu ukhumai.
Ghar mero tanahu ho launa ke bhanam bhanam bho.

Na rup maa khot timro sundar gulabi otha timro.
Ke hereu tesari o kho laaj lagyo besari.

O hoi marsyandi salala paniko bhel kisimai raichha ni mayako khel.

Tan ramro Mam ramro timi lajauda jhan ramro.
Jiu pani kasilo timro muharai hasilo.

Ke socheu bhanata timle paraichheu Manata.
Ma ta gurung ki chhori ho mero khyalmai dil chori bho.

snippet.title: Machar ko leke bapuji Hogaye bhide pe ghussa! | FULL MOVIE | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Step into Jethalal’s world with Gada Electronics!  Manage the shop, tackle quirky customers, and experience nonstop TMKOC-style fun. 

Are you ready for the challenge? 
Play now: https://gadaelectronics.page.link/dhgB  
#GadaElectronics #TMKOCGame

Watch the FULL MOVIE of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: https://youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSk2_rPKNCDcjNAA8vaDN-E&si=rC5AotwLD2r3MHna

Click here to watch NEW Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzSxhJ6UCi6tgujD-FsAy0sw

Click here to watch your favourite videos from Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah: 
https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta', is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' and a mischievous son 'Tapu'. Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalal' to call his father 'Champaklal' from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Nitish Bhaluni / Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu)
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Sachin Shroff / Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Sunayana Fozdar / Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Jheel Mehta / Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani / Khushi Mali as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu)
Gurucharan Singh / Balwinder Singh Suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal / Monaz Mevawala as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Samay Shah as Gurucharan Singh Roshan Singh Sodhi (Gogi)
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah / Dharmit Turakhia as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Kuldeep Gor as Ratan Binjola
Dharti Bhatt as Rupa Baditop Binjola
Akshaan Sehrawat as Veer
Maahi Bhadra as Bansari
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku
Ghanshyam Nayak / Kiran Bhatt as Nattu Kaka
Tanmay Vekaria as Bagha
Navina Wadekar / Monika Bhadoriya as Bawri
Daya Shankar Pandey as Chalu Pandey
Rakesh Bedi as Taarak's Boss
Mayur Vakani as Sundarlal
Kanti Joshi as Baka

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani
Written By: Raju Odedra & Rajen Upadhyay
Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

More Useful Links :
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/tmkoc.sabtv
* Follow us on Instagram : http://www.instagram.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmahnfp
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/tmkoc_ntf

snippet.title: New Lunar New Year, Honourable Mentions  Pack Opening - FC MOBILE
snippet.description:
It’s a HUGE Thursday in FC Mobile! We have 3 massive events live right now: Honorable Mentions, Jingga Week 2, and Lunar New Year!

Today’s video is UNCUT and UNFILTERED. I went all in on the new packs to hunt for the best 117 OVR cards. We started strong with the Lunar New Year packs and pulled an insane 117 Buffon almost immediately!

Then, we shifted to Honorable Mentions where I packed the "Future GOAT" Lamine Yamal and Michael Olise. But the grind didn't stop there. I exchanged half my team (including Vini Jr and Harry Kane!) to get enough tokens to claim 117 Ruud Gullit and 117 Maicon to build a 119 OVR Super Squad.

🔥 PACK OPENING HIGHLIGHTS:

Lunar New Year: Packing 117 Buffon & Capdevila 🐉
Honorable Mentions: Pulling 117 Lamine Yamal & Olise 🌟
Zinga Week 2: The hunt for a Brazilian RB (Maicon) 🇧🇷
The Exchange: Sacrificing 116+ OVR players for Tokens ♻️
The Upgrade: Claiming Gullit & Maicon for the squad!

📩 Business Inquiries → *rkreddy@digitalsportsmgmt.com*

📺 Check Out My Other Channels:
🎮 Main FC Mobile Channel → https://www.youtube.com/@RkReddy
⚽ Player & Club-Based FC Mobile Content → https://www.youtube.com/@RkReddy2.0
📽️ FC 26 Career Mode Videos → https://www.youtube.com/@rkreddyplus

massive minecraft war

Minecraft Pro VS 1000 Players

Unstable SMP:
➜  @ParrotX2 
➜  ⁨@FlameFragsMC 
➜  ⁨@Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨@wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @minutetechmc @LettuceK 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes)
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCFCKUxeHEDpElmqZ2zl9aUQ (used the song Counterblade during the end battle!)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)
